summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ForgePilot extended features including tooltips, agent status pills, live preview, and backend tools
passed_tests: Tooltips appear after 2-3 seconds hover delay on all buttons
All 7 Agent Status Pills have working tooltips with descriptions
Live Preview iframe container displays correctly
Browser bar shows entry point or 'No preview available' message
External Preview button ('Preview öffnen') is present and functional
Backend API is accessible and responsive
Web Search Tool is available in backend using DuckDuckGo
mark_ready_for_push Tool is implemented in backend
File explorer displays project files correctly
Workspace navigation and UI elements work properly
